what_it_does: Records an image attachment in the design-assets channel, pointing to the image resource at image://design-assets/icons/Feature_4_Info and noting when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The id att-c1e0586a matches the filename stem.
The target uses an image:// URI scheme.
The added timestamp is ISO 8601 with a timezone offset.
standouts: image:// URI as the asset target
Filename derived from the attachment id
concerns: Lacks descriptive title, alt text, or dimensions for the referenced image
notes: A bare attachment ledger stub that links a design-assets channel entry to a specific icon image URI.
questions: What does the image at image://design-assets/icons/Feature_4_Info depict?
How is the image:// URI scheme resolved to an actual asset store?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's fields indicate it is meant to record an image attachment, and it does exactly that by storing the channel, type, target URI, and timestamp.
intention_signals: To create a durable, referenceable record of an image attachment associated with the design-assets channel so it can be retrieved or audited later.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI scheme to locate the referenced asset.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, id-stable pointer from a channel attachment record to a specific design image asset, enabling asset tracking and retrieval.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file for the design-assets channel that references an image asset at image://design-assets/icons/Feature_4_Info and records its addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment in the design-assets channel with a stable id and a resolvable asset URI.
